features.name: part_select_assignment_feedback_loop
features.description: Code should include a logic signal assigned from a part-select of another signal, where that source signal has assignments creating a feedback loop back to the derived signal
features.snippet:
logic [3:0] fooIn = x[5:2];
logic [9:0] barIn = x[11:2];

features.name: multiple_parallel_part_selects_same_source
features.description: Code should include multiple signals assigned from different part-selects of the same source signal, creating potential circular logic paths
features.snippet:
logic [3:0] fooIn = x[5:2];
logic [9:0] barIn = x[11:2];
